name: YDeck Investor Update
tagline: A metric-forward investor update deck with traction, runway, milestones, risks, and asks.

layouts.name: Opening thesis
layouts.description: Set the strategic point of view with one confident statement.

layouts.name: Context map
layouts.description: Frame the market, audience, system, or situation.

layouts.name: Problem and response
layouts.description: Show the tension and the proposed answer.

layouts.name: Audience insight
layouts.description: Explain who matters and what they need.

layouts.name: Metric dashboard
layouts.description: Surface the leading numbers and interpretation.

layouts.name: Evidence grid
layouts.description: Organize proof points, research, or examples.

layouts.name: Comparison matrix
layouts.description: Compare options with a visible recommendation.

layouts.name: Timeline process
layouts.description: Show stages, roadmap, or learning sequence.

layouts.name: Operating model
layouts.description: Explain roles, loops, systems, or governance.

layouts.name: Image feature
layouts.description: Use a large visual zone with annotations.

layouts.name: Financial logic
layouts.description: Show budget, ROI, runway, or investment tradeoffs.

layouts.name: Exercise or working slide
layouts.description: Give the audience something to inspect or solve.

layouts.name: Quote and evidence
layouts.description: Anchor the idea in a strong voice or principle.

layouts.name: Closing decision
layouts.description: End with recommendation, reasons, and action.

charting.slideHtmlPolicy: Embed returned SVG inline. Do not include chart scripts, remote assets, or runtime dependencies in slide HTML.

icons.policy: Use create_icon_visual for icon groups. Embed returned HTML/SVG inline. Do not use emoji, generic stars, crude custom icons, remote icon fonts, CDN icon scripts, or browser-side icon packages in slide HTML.

description: A metric-forward investor update deck with traction, runway, milestones, risks, and asks.

compatibility.migrationPolicy: preserve generated deck artifacts; use template version only for new generations

typography.policy: Use these local server-renderable stacks. Do not use remote font imports or CDN font URLs in preview or generated slide HTML.
